jobs.title: PRADA Department Manager (m/f/d)
jobs.description: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Department Manager (m/f/d) to join our dynamic team in our Prada Department Store in KaDeWe in Berlin. As a Department Manager, you will be a Company Brand Ambassador and to be responsible for achieving all the qualitative and quantitative objectives of the product category department assigned. You will manage and motivate the department team in achieving the sales target, ensuring extraordinary Client service experience, being present on the sales floor, managing the activities of the department. At PRADA, we are renowned for our unwavering commitment to luxury, style, and innovation. As one of the global leaders in the fashion industry, we are dedicated to delivering exceptional experiences to our esteemed clientele. Our brand represents a fusion of tradition and modernity, and our Client Advisors play a pivotal role in providing personalized service and creating memorable moments for our discerning customers. RESPONSIBILITIES Deliver exceptional client experience, driving cross-selling, customer satisfaction, and long-term loyalty Lead the team to exceed KPIs by analyzing department performance and implementing targeted action plans Actively support business growth by sharing commercial insights, market trends, and recommendations with the Store Manager Develop and inspire the sales team through training in product knowledge, sales techniques, customer service, and company procedures Identify and nurture high-potential talent, encouraging internal development and knowledge sharing through effective communication and briefings Drive department growth by strengthening clienteling activities, expanding the local customer base, and supporting e-commerce development Ensure operational excellence through strong visual merchandising, efficient back-of-house organization, product expertise, and asset protection KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS +5 years’ experience in a leading role in the (luxury) retail environment Passionate about the product category, with strong market and product knowledge as well as interest in luxury, fashion, art, A business-driven mindset with solid problem-solving skills, and a collaborative team player able to lead, influence, and inspire peers Customer-centric approach with a natural ability to serve and engage clients Fluent in German and English Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: MIU MIU In-Store CRM Manager, Harrods

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile CRM In-Store MIU MIU, Harrods
titleByLocale.en: MIU MIU In-Store CRM Manager, Harrods
titleByLocale.de: MIU MIU In-Store CRM Manager, Harrods
titleByLocale.fr: MIU MIU In-Store CRM Manager, Harrods

jobs.description: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE The In-Store CRM Manager will be responsible for managing the client portfolio as a strategic business asset in Harrods. The role focuses on strengthening and developing CRM & clienteling initiatives in store and supporting the sales staff with a strong focus on driving business through CRM campaigns, client outreach initiatives (client interactions) and private appointments. The In-Store CRM Manager must be comfortable with data analysis, Excel, and campaign management to make data-driven decisions and manage the client portfolio strategically. RESPONSIBILITIES Manage the client portfolio strategically, focusing on segmentation, forecasting, and growth of client relationships. Design and execute advanced client segmentation strategies, ensuring targeted outreach for high-value clients, prioritising engagement strategies that drive long-term loyalty. Analyse client data and manage the client portfolio using tools like Excel and the business CRM platform (C-Sphere) to extract insights, build reports to assess key KPIs, forecast client engagement opportunities, and drive targeted campaigns. Drive innovation by benchmarking CRM strategies within the market, staying updated on trends, and introducing new client engagement techniques. Ensure the development, implementation and execution of store CRM campaigns, including the local outreach activities, client target list extraction, and performance monitoring. Tie CRM efforts directly to sales and revenue goals, ensuring measurable impacts on store and individual client advisor performance through effective CRM strategy management. Manage client gifting and customer experiences budget to strategically enhance client relationships. Collaborate across departments to align CRM outreach and engagement strategies with store events, product launches and communications campaigns. Conduct training sessions to ensure team members understand the importance of CRM and feel confident in using related tools and strategies. Train and support sales staff in using digital tools (e.g. C-Sphere) to perform clienteling initiatives. Provide individual feedback on specific CRM initiatives and share best practices with the store team. Ensure adoption, consistent execution and follow-up of the Group clienteling strategy, resources and culture across all store team members. Monitor and track CRM based KPIs for client outreach, private appointments, prospects, productivity and outreach initiative performance. Develop CRM strategies that align with business objectives with key business objectives and contribute directly to sales growth. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Luxury retail management experience is preferred. Strong technical attitude and digital mindset. Languages: English, other language is mandatory. Client centric attitude, problem solving, flexibility, empathy, energy. Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: PRADA Visual Merchandiser
jobs.description: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE To be responsible for the implementation and maintenance of the store windows and interiors assigned based on the guidelines and creative inputs defined by the Visual Merchandising Manager with the goal of increasing sales and in compliance with the brand image and company products. RESPONSIBILITIES Support the set up and maintenance of window displays and interiors, adjusting them to the type and merchandising of single stores. Set up and maintain in-store merchandising of the category, implementing the received guidelines and design inputs, based on sales trends, market peculiarities, customer target and reference competitors. Solve specific store visual merchandising challenges that require adaptations including store size and merchandising/inventory level. Co-ordinate with the Retail Merchandising Department to understand the merchandising guidelines and implement the visual strategy based on business needs. Cooperate with the Retail Merchandising Department for the implementation of appropriate outfits for the market, the customers and the season based on products in stock. Visit stores on a regular basis to ensure that Visual Merchandising standards are maintained in all of them. Provide appropriate indications to the In-Store Visual referring person. Cooperate with the Communication Department to the implementation of In-Store Events and Press Presentations, when required. Provide training to shop staff to ensure that the display is maintained up to corporate standards. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Creative Mindset More than 3 years of experience in VM for international fashion companies and/or in creative fields. International and/or regional experience would be an advantage. Proficiency in Photoshop and Illustrator and Adobe software. Good interpersonal skills Self-motivated. Able to work independently as required, but able to function as part of a larger team structure. Willingness to travel Good command of English language Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.en: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE To be responsible for the implementation and maintenance of the store windows and interiors assigned based on the guidelines and creative inputs defined by the Visual Merchandising Manager with the goal of increasing sales and in compliance with the brand image and company products. RESPONSIBILITIES Support the set up and maintenance of window displays and interiors, adjusting them to the type and merchandising of single stores. Set up and maintain in-store merchandising of the category, implementing the received guidelines and design inputs, based on sales trends, market peculiarities, customer target and reference competitors. Solve specific store visual merchandising challenges that require adaptations including store size and merchandising/inventory level. Co-ordinate with the Retail Merchandising Department to understand the merchandising guidelines and implement the visual strategy based on business needs. Cooperate with the Retail Merchandising Department for the implementation of appropriate outfits for the market, the customers and the season based on products in stock. Visit stores on a regular basis to ensure that Visual Merchandising standards are maintained in all of them. Provide appropriate indications to the In-Store Visual referring person. Cooperate with the Communication Department to the implementation of In-Store Events and Press Presentations, when required. Provide training to shop staff to ensure that the display is maintained up to corporate standards. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Creative Mindset More than 3 years of experience in VM for international fashion companies and/or in creative fields. International and/or regional experience would be an advantage. Proficiency in Photoshop and Illustrator and Adobe software. Good interpersonal skills Self-motivated. Able to work independently as required, but able to function as part of a larger team structure. Willingness to travel Good command of English language Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. jobs.title: Stage HR Industrial Pelletteria

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste RH pour la couture industrielle

jobs.description: Fondato nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada si è costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in oltre 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa e conta dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. SCOPO La risorsa sarà inserita all’interno del team HR dedicato all’area Pelletteria presso il nostro Headquarter in Toscana (Terranuova Bracciolini, AR) e fornirà supporto operativo alle attività di amministrazione del personale, recruiting, formazione e reporting HR RESPONSABILITA’ Supporto alle attività amministrative legate all’assunzione e all’onboarding del personale, inclusa la predisposizione dei contratti e della documentazione correlata Inserimento e gestione della documentazione del personale nei sistemi aziendali Monitoraggio delle scadenze del personale in somministrazione e interfaccia con le Agenzie per il Lavoro (APL) di riferimento Supporto alle attività di selezione per figure dedicate alla produzione interna (es. tagliatori, preparatori, macchiniste, banchisti, ecc.) Supporto alle selezioni per le figure dedicate agli uffici dell’HQ industriale Predisposizione e aggiornamento della reportistica di selezione per ciascun plant di riferimento Aggiornamento della reportistica HR periodica (assenteismo, malattia, straordinari) Supporto operativo a 360° al personale REQUISITI Background accademico preferibilmente in ambito scientifico Interesse per il mondo delle Risorse Umane, in particolare per i processi HR in contesti industriali strutturati Buona dimestichezza con Excel e con i principali strumenti informatici (pacchetto Office) Approccio pratico e operativo, con capacità di lavorare su attività diverse in modo organizzato Buone capacità relazionali e predisposizione al lavoro in team Entrare a far parte della nostra Azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che diamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, favorendone la crescita professionale. Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità a tutti i candidati, indipendentemente da genere, etnia, orientamento sessuale, disabilità, o altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un ambiente di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti.

descriptionByLocale.en: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group has built a tradition of excellence and a vision of innovation. The Group, a global leader in the luxury sector, operates in over 45 countries with brands PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe, and Luna Rossa, employing over 100 nationalities. The role will be inserted into the HR team dedicated to the Tailoring area at our headquarters in Tuscany (Terranuova Bracciolini, AR) and will provide operational support to the administrative tasks, recruitment, training, and HR reporting. Responsibilities: - Support administrative tasks related to employee recruitment and onboarding, including contract preparation and related documentation - Insert and manage employee documentation in company systems - Monitor employee leave and interface with relevant labor agencies (APL) - Support recruitment for internal production roles (e.g., cutters, preparers, machinists, bankers, etc.) - Support recruitment for roles in the industrial HQ offices - Prepare and update selection reporting for each plant - Update periodic HR reporting (absenteeism, illness, extraordinary) - Provide 360-degree operational support to staff Requirements: - Academic background preferably in scientific fields - Interest in the Human Resources world, particularly in industrial structured HR processes - Proficiency with Excel and main information tools (Office package) - Practical and operational approach, with the ability to work on diverse activities in an organized manner - Strong relational skills and teamwork orientation What we offer: Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the pursuit of excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value we give to talent and passion, fostering their professional growth. The Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe diversity is a value and we commit to building an equitable and respectful work environment for all.
descriptionByLocale.de: Gründet wurde 1913 in Italien, hat die Prada Group eine Tradition von Excellence und eine Vision der Innovation aufgebaut. Die Gruppe, eine weltweit führende Marke im Luxussektor, betreibt in über 45 Ländern mit Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe und Luna Rossa und beschäftigt über 100 verschiedene Nationalitäten. Die Position wird in das HR-Team für die Schuhmacher-Bereiche in unserem Hauptquartier in Toskana (Terranuova Bracciolini, AR) integriert und wird operationalen Unterstützung für administrative Aufgaben, Recruitment, Training und HR-Berichterstattung bieten. Verantwortlichkeiten: - Unterstützung der administrativen Aufgaben im Zusammenhang mit der Einstellung und Einarbeitung von Personal, einschließlich der Vorbereitung von Verträgen und korrelierter Dokumentation - Einfügen und Verwaltung von Personal-Dokumenten in Unternehmenssystemen - Überwachung der Fristen für Personal in der Ausübung und Interface mit relevanten Arbeitsagenturen (APL) - Unterstützung bei der Einstellung für interne Produktionsrollen (z.B. Schneider, Vorbereiter, Maschinen, Bankier, etc.) - Unterstützung bei der Einstellung für Rollen in den industriellen Hauptquartier- Büros - Vorbereitung und Aktualisierung der Berichterstattung zur Auswahl für jede Referenz- Plant - Aktualisierung der regelmäßigen HR-Berichterstattung (Fehlzeiten, Krankheit, außergewöhnlich) - 360-Gradige operatives Unterstützung für das Personal Anforderungen: - akademischer Hintergrund vorzugsweise in wissenschaftlichen Bereichen - Interesse an der Personalressourcenwelt, insbesondere in strukturierten HR-Prozessen in industriellen Umgebungen - Profizienz mit Excel und den wichtigsten Informationswerkzeugen (Office-Paket) - Praktischer und operativer Ansatz, mit der Fähigkeit, auf verschiedene Aktivitäten in einer organisierten Weise zu arbeiten - Starke relationale Fähigkeiten und Teamarbeit Was wir bieten: Das Einarbeiten in unsere Firma bedeutet, in einer kreativen und internationalen Umgebung zu arbeiten, mit Teams von Menschen, die von Neugier und dem Streben nach Excellence motiviert sind. Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und der Wert, den wir dem Talent und der Leidenschaft unserer Mitarbeiter geben, fördernd ihre berufliche Entwicklung. Die Prada Group fördert eine inklusive Arbeitsumgebung, gewährleistend gleiche Chancen für alle Bewerber, unabhängig von Geschlecht, Ethnie, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen. Wir glauben, dass Diversität ein Wert ist und wir uns verpflichten, eine gerechte und respektvolle Arbeitsumgebung für alle zu schaffen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Fondé en 1913 en Italie, le groupe Prada a construit une tradition d'excellence et une vision d'innovation. Le groupe, leader mondial dans le secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa, et emploie plus de 100 nationalités. La fonction sera intégrée dans l'équipe RH dédiée à la couture au sein de notre siège en Toscane (Terranuova Bracciolini, AR) et fournira un soutien opérationnel aux tâches administratives, au recrutement, à la formation et au reporting RH. Responsabilités: - Soutien aux tâches administratives liées à l'embauche et à l'intégration du personnel, y compris la préparation des contrats et de la documentation connexe - Insertion et gestion de la documentation du personnel dans les systèmes d'entreprise - Surveillance des échéances du personnel en service et interface avec les agences de travail (APL) de référence - Soutien au recrutement pour les postes de production interne (par exemple, coupeurs, préparateurs, machinistes, banquiers, etc.) - Soutien au recrutement pour les postes dans les bureaux de l'HQ industriel - Préparation et mise à jour de la documentation de sélection pour chaque plant de référence - Mise à jour de la documentation RH périodique (absentéisme, maladie, extraordinaire) - Soutien opérationnel à 360° au personnel Exigences: - Background académique préférentiellement dans le domaine scientifique - Intérêt pour le monde des ressources humaines, en particulier pour les processus RH dans des contextes industriels structurés - Maîtrise d'Excel et des principaux outils informatiques (package Office) - Approche pratique et opérationnelle, avec la capacité de travailler sur diverses activités de manière organisée - Bonnes compétences relationnelles et orientation au travail en équipe Ce que nous offrons: Rejoindre notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la recherche de l'excellence. Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous donnons au talent et à la passion de nos employés, favorisant ainsi leur croissance professionnelle. Le groupe Prada promouve un environnement de travail inclusif, garantissant des opportunités égales à tous les candidats, indépendamment du genre, de l'origine ethnique, de l'orientation sexuelle, de la handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous nous engageons à construire un environnement de travail équitable et respectueux pour tous.

jobs.description: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE As the Brand Store Manager, you are a passionate Brand Ambassador and a business leader, who conveys the Brand philosophy and values to the local market, the Store team and to the final Client. RESPONSIBILITIES Leading the Business Drive Store Team to exceed Financial targets and maximize sales performances, determining the success of the entire store Propose and develop action plans, through careful analysis of performance Drive the Store team to exceed their KPI targets, including cross selling and up selling among product categories Client Development Place the Client above all, leading by example to create a welcoming environment and to ensure the Team strives to meet their every need and request Foster a Client centric mindset developing and maintaining solid Client relationships and enforcing meaningful after sales experiences Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service through the execution of the “Brand Selling Ceremony” Team Management Act as a strong Staff motivator, promoting team spırıt through effective communication, and cultivating a positive and energetic environment, even to the eyes of the Client Encourage the exchange of information within the team and proactively develop morning briefing on specific topics Master fully all company tools and applications including IT and digital, and ensure team is constantly informed of relevant updates Understand the needs and priorities, train and inspire the Store team on product knowledge, sales techniques, Client Services, and Company policies and procedures Boutique Care Lead by example to ensure the Team operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Product, evident in every ceremony or procedure Ensure display attracts Clients and maximizes sales, in accordance with Company guidelines – proactively seek VM and MD support based on store needs Provıde feedback and suggestions when necessary to the Visual Merchandising and the Retail Merchandising departments KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS At least 8 years of experience Strong problem-solving and organizational skills Ability to manage multiple priorities and coordinate across functions Excellent communication skills and team spirit Fluency in both Italian and English Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.description: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE As Client Advisor, you guarantee an extraordinary and memorable luxury client experience, placing the Client above all, discovering their needs and expectations, fostering meaningful relationships, serving as a Brand Ambassador. You convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world our brands. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team sales target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the client needs both in store and on ecommerce channel. RESPONSIBILITIES Act as a true brand ambassador, leveraging the human touch to create a welcoming and inspiring environment that drives client engagement and brings the brand’s values to life; Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and Inclusion values. Embrace leadership behaviors demonstrating a positive attitude and ability to work in team, showing adaptability to the needs of the business. Place the Client at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”; Be driven to exceed individual sales targets and maximize own sales performances contributing to the success of the entire store; Be driven to exceed KPI goals, ensuring the highest quality of sales and client service; Demonstrate an excellent knowledge of the products as well as our brands, culture and DNA; Build and maintain an ample knowledge of the world of luxury fashion by being constantly informed on fashion trends and competitors, with the purpose to be able to discuss them with the clients and to give advises; Take ownership of resolving Client complaints liaising with the line manager and Client Service team, when necessary; Operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Products; Utilize Company digital tools actively to offer a complete and integrated luxury experience; Capture Client data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships (when CRM campaigns will be activated) to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities; Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset; Host and conduct client appointments either in presence or leveraging technology to do virtual meeting; Work in synergy with the Back of House, participating to the daily operations of the store and preserving the stock room organized; Act in compliance with Company operational and stock procedures, ensuring the safeguarding of Company assets, cash handling (as required, in line with store leadership requests), inventory, logistics and all key reporting activities required by Head Office, while proactively executing Company policies and procedures. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Passion for building long-lasting relationships with clients and peers Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion Experience in a luxury or premium retail environment is a plus Being able to work in team, as well as alone Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluent spoken English expected Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.fr: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE As Client Advisor, you guarantee an extraordinary and memorable luxury client experience, placing the Client above all, discovering their needs and expectations, fostering meaningful relationships, serving as a Brand Ambassador. You convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world our brands. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team sales target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the client needs both in store and on ecommerce channel. RESPONSIBILITIES Act as a true brand ambassador, leveraging the human touch to create a welcoming and inspiring environment that drives client engagement and brings the brand’s values to life; Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and Inclusion values. Embrace leadership behaviors demonstrating a positive attitude and ability to work in team, showing adaptability to the needs of the business. Place the Client at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”; Be driven to exceed individual sales targets and maximize own sales performances contributing to the success of the entire store; Be driven to exceed KPI goals, ensuring the highest quality of sales and client service; Demonstrate an excellent knowledge of the products as well as our brands, culture and DNA; Build and maintain an ample knowledge of the world of luxury fashion by being constantly informed on fashion trends and competitors, with the purpose to be able to discuss them with the clients and to give advises; Take ownership of resolving Client complaints liaising with the line manager and Client Service team, when necessary; Operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Products; Utilize Company digital tools actively to offer a complete and integrated luxury experience; Capture Client data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships (when CRM campaigns will be activated) to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities; Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset; Host and conduct client appointments either in presence or leveraging technology to do virtual meeting; Work in synergy with the Back of House, participating to the daily operations of the store and preserving the stock room organized; Act in compliance with Company operational and stock procedures, ensuring the safeguarding of Company assets, cash handling (as required, in line with store leadership requests), inventory, logistics and all key reporting activities required by Head Office, while proactively executing Company policies and procedures.
